items.name_en: ®Officially New® Basket
items.name_cn:
®Officially New® Basket
MCM Toni Visetos X-mini
Style 65040
·Cp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Crossbody or Shoulder Bag, Officially New!
This mini Toni shopper features a unique geometric design and is a compact everyday bag. Soft leather handles and an adjustable leather shoulder strap allow for two carrying styles.
Model: MWPFSMT03CO001
Size: 16*9*14cm
Strap: 100-126cm/Removable
Handle Drop: 9cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾

items.name_cn:
🌹🌹🌹
🦈[MCM] mini versatile crossbody bag: The Visetos series is designed for MCM lovers, showcasing the timeless style of the classic MCM Visetos.
This crossbody bag is lightweight and convenient, making it easy to go out with just a phone and a few cards, keeping it within reach. You can also create your own personal fashion style by matching accessories or changing the crossbody strap.
Dimensions: 18.5x12x4.5cm
Removable crossbody strap
Zipper closure
Front zip pocket
External back open pocket
Metallic tone set of 5

items.name_en: 🌹🌹🌹 MCM Visetos cylindrical crossbody bag
items.name_cn:
🌹🌹🌹 MCM Visetos cylindrical crossbody bag
The geometric shape of this small crossbody bag is more refined against the classic Visetos pattern 🌹 and the gold-tone logo plate. The bag is made of 🇫🇷 French Nappa cowhide and features a double zipper closure. The fabric-lined interior offers ample space to store your valuables. This cylindrical crossbody bag can be carried by the top leather handle or by using the included crossbody strap for portability. Strap length is 98 to 114 cm
Dimensions: 16x16x14cm

items.name_en: 🌹🌹🌹MCM Kelly mini shoulder bag showcases MCM's long history and tradition. A fashionable and elegant style, with a top handle design, a front flap with a turn-lock closure, and an adjustable single-shoulder strap. A classic reproduction made of iconic Visetos print coated canvas, with gold hardware enhancing the exquisite beauty. Dimensions: 18x15x10cm

items.name_en: 661040🌷Original Goods🌷New Waist Pack Launch,
items.name_cn:
661040🌷Original Goods🌷New Waist Pack Launch,
「New Release---MCM: Stark Visetos Waist Pack」
Made from coated canvas with a signature classic print. This functional Stark waist pack injects a stylish vibe into your look. Durable, adjustable signature fabric strap can be worn at the waist or crossbody, and two secure zippered compartments provide ample storage for your essentials.
Material: PU + Cowhide (Strap length 65-106cm)
Mini Size: 12X34X7cm
